title: La Cena Blanca de Romina
overview: There's a magical night for the girls of San Pedro, in the province of Jujuy. It's the White Dinner, the party they throw when they graduate from high school. Romina Tejerina couldn't have it: on the day of her White Dinner, she was in prison; she had killed the baby she conceived after a rape that went unpunished.
